shared_rtl_note: ibex is a single parameterized SystemVerilog core (no Chisel/FIRRTL). Every configuration elaborates from the SAME rtl/ sources; a 'config' is a set of -G parameters / -D defines applied at build time, not a distinct RTL. rtl/ and flat/ were verified byte-identical (md5) across all three configs, so they are stored once here and each config is captured by configs/<config>.params.

small.description: smallest supported ibex: 2-stage pipeline, RV32IMC, fast (multi-cycle) multiplier, no cache, no PMP
small.key_params: RV32M=RV32MFast, RV32ZC=Zca, ICache=0, WritebackStage=0, BranchTargetALU=0, SecureIbex=0, PMPEnable=0, MHPMCounterNum=0

maxperf.description: max-performance ibex: 3-stage pipeline (writeback stage), single-cycle multiplier, branch-target ALU, RV32IMC + Zcb/Zcmp; no cache, no PMP, no security
maxperf.key_params: RV32M=RV32MSingleCycle, RV32ZC=ZcaZcbZcmp, BranchTargetALU=1, WritebackStage=1, ICache=0, SecureIbex=0, PMPEnable=0

opentitan.description: the config used in OpenTitan Earl Grey: security-hardened (SecureIbex, dual-core lockstep), ICache with ECC + scrambling, PMP (16 regions), bitmanip RV32BOTEarlGrey, 10 HPM counters, debug triggers
opentitan.key_params: RV32M=RV32MSingleCycle, RV32B=RV32BOTEarlGrey, ICache=1, ICacheECC=1, ICacheScramble=1, SecureIbex=1, PMPEnable=1, PMPNumRegions=16, DbgTriggerEn=1, MHPMCounterNum=10

contents.rtl/: 143 as-generated SystemVerilog sources for ibex_simple_system (core + lowRISC prim library + sim RAM/timer/bus/tracer harness), one module per file. rtl/lint/*.vlt are the Verilator lint waivers. `+incdir+rtl` resolves the `include headers (prim_assert.sv, prim_secded_inc.svh, prim_util_memload.svh, ...).
contents.flat/ibex_top.flat.sv: single self-contained file: the synthesizable DUT ibex_top (119 modules), Verilator-preprocessed so every `include is inlined and macros expanded; lints standalone with no +incdir. This is the ChipTop/XSTop analogue for ibex.
contents.ibex_simple_system.f: filelist: full Verilator sim (top ibex_simple_system) = ibex_top + sim RAM/timer/bus + disassembly tracer + memutil-DPI loader harness.
contents.ibex_top.f: filelist: synthesizable DUT only (top ibex_top), sim-only modules removed.
contents.configs/<config>.params: the -G parameters and -D defines that select this configuration; pass them to Verilator/your tool on top of a filelist.
contents.meta/: rtl_order.txt (build order), waivers.txt, and the three lint logs (flat, DUT, harness).

notes: flat/ is the DUT ibex_top only (no sim harness), mirroring the ChipTop/XSTop convention of the other cores here. The -D RV32M/RV32B/RV32ZC/RegFile defines do NOT change ibex_top's body (they only set parameters at the ibex_simple_system level), so a single flat file covers all three configs; apply configs/<config>.params to elaborate a specific one.

Verilator 5.048 flags a benign UNOPTFLAT (circular combinational logic over bit-slices in ibex_controller / ibex_cs_registers) - a known false positive that ibex's own simple_system build also waives. Lint and the flat file are checked with -Wno-UNOPTFLAT.
The full sim harness (ibex_simple_system.f) additionally needs -Wno-MULTIDRIVEN for the sim-only disassembly tracer (ibex_tracer.sv); the synthesizable DUT has no such warning.
SRAMs are behavioral models (prim_generic_ram_*, sim ram_1p/ram_2p). Good for simulation/formal; not PDK macros.
ibex is hand-written SystemVerilog (no Chisel/FIRRTL), so there is no .fir/.dts to include.
Built with -DRVFI=1 so the RISC-V Formal Interface tracer ports are present, as ibex's simple_system uses.

simulation.hello_test: PASS on all 3 configs - prints 'Hello simple system', services timer interrupts, clean $finish (261 instrs retired)

coremark.note: CoreMark 10 iterations, rv32imc, -O3, built with the lowRISC rv32imcb gcc. 'Correct operation validated' (CRC self-check) on all three configs.
